subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! The very atoms bear witness unto Thy grandeur and to Thy majesty, and the entire creation doth testify unto Thy power
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی قد شهدت الذرات لعظمتک و سلطانک و الکائنات بقدرتک و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
